---
title: "Parsing 2025-2026"
output: html_document
---

Packages:
```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
```

C. Elegans worms were treated with Ethanol, Yucca, and Resveratrol solutions and their average movements were recorded using a Wiggleometer, the data was uploaded onto a csv. There are currently 20 cvs that were recorded over the course of several months. This files serves to parse the data.

Extracted data:
- Average activity counts per data intervals
- Standard Error

Excluded points:
-
